summary: Connect the Notes - Brazilian Artists Expansion fully tested. All backend APIs working (13/13 tests passed), frontend UI verified for search, artist selection with DiceBear avatars, game board, and path finding. Successfully tested Brazilian artist flow (Anitta->Rihanna in 1 step via Lemon Remix).
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper async/await usage, clean API structure
DiceBear avatar integration working well with lorelei style
Genre icons from lucide-react properly mapped in avatars.js
seed_data_creation: None - existing seed data with 590 artists and 1087 collaborations tested successfully
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brazilian artists expansion fully tested. Anitta, Ludmilla, Caetano Veloso, Alok all searchable with proper collaborations. DiceBear avatars working with lorelei style. Genre icons displaying correctly. Game flow from artist selection through win screen working perfectly.

tested_paths: Anitta -> Ludmilla (1 step via 'Anitta x Ludmilla Medley')
Caetano -> Anitta (1 step via 'Caetano x Anitta (Live)')
